sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The agent moved RIGHT. Let me check the agent's current position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check maze around agent
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRows 18-32, cols 13-42:")
for i in range(18, 33):
    row = ""
    for j in range(13, 42):
        ch = ascii_lines[i][j]
        if ch == 'W':
            row += '.'
        elif ch == 'B':
            row += '#'
        elif ch == 'R':
            row += 'R'
        elif ch == 'b':
            row += '@'
        else:
            row += '?'
    print(f"Row {i:2d}: {row}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
